infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: unimportant-pics reviews photos you choose so it can recommend what to keep, review, or delete.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: unimportant-pics needs photo library access to help you confirm deletions through iOS.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow unimportant-pics to review your photo library and suggest photos to keep, review, or delete.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow unimportant-pics to request deletion after you confirm your delete list.
